metadata.description: Production-grade standards for Claude Code — Flutter, API (NestJS + Prisma), Web (Next.js). Install a pack, Claude applies the standards. No CLAUDE.md edits.

plugins.name: flutter-standards
plugins.description: Flutter pack — 10 auto-invoke standards (craft, engineering, widgets, data, testing, a11y, perf, forms, observability, production-readiness with smart Detect→Check→Suggest audits). Audit commands (pre-ship, premium-check, verify-screens) are thin wrappers that delegate iteration to core-skills:verify-changes; audit-a11y-patterns is a fast regex sweep; find-hardcoded, find-duplicates, and scaffolds remain standalone.

plugins.name: api-standards
plugins.description: API pack — NestJS + Prisma. 2 auto-invoke standards (nestjs, code-quality with smart Detect→Check→Suggest audits for rate limiting, idempotency, retries, webhooks, graceful shutdown, health, correlation IDs, soft delete, audit logs, DB pool), sync-migrate workflow.

plugins.name: web-standards
plugins.description: Web pack — Next.js + Tailwind + shadcn. 3 auto-invoke standards (nextjs, production-readiness with §R1–§R10 rule IDs, craft-guide with §1–§15 rule IDs — universal design formulas across color+contrast+harmony, spacing, type, shadow, radius, motion, state, responsive, aesthetic coherence, iconography, chrome, a11y, theme, microcopy, brand moments). Audit commands (pre-ship, premium-check, theme-audit, aesthetic-coherence) are thin wrappers that delegate iteration to core-skills:verify-changes; extract-tokens writes the token source of truth. Universal formulas enforced; brand values come from user.

plugins.name: core-hooks
plugins.description: Hooks-only plugin. SessionStart surfaces plugin-hook mechanics + (opt-in) mandatory-skills preamble. PreToolUse blocks edits to secrets, dangerous shell, raw design values in token-managed projects, and — when enforcement mode is opted in via .claude/enforcement.json — a per-pack rule registry. Stop hook blocks turn-end until each mandatory pack's gate has passed. Rules live in the stack skill packs; this plugin enforces them deterministically.

plugins.name: core-skills
plugins.description: Cross-stack skills. docs-sync catches code/doc drift at end-of-task. verify-changes is the canonical audit engine — accepts a structured brief from stack-pack thin-wrappers and owns iteration, batching, and the fix loop. subagent-brief enforces warm-brief discipline when delegating. Pure prompts — no hooks.
